title: Airtel Africa Set To Release Financial Statements On January 29
description: Airtel Africa Plc leading provider of telecommunications and mobile money services, with a presence in 14 countries across Africa, will announce its results for the nine months to 31 December 2020 on
html:
Airtel Africa Plc leading provider of telecommunications and mobile money services, with a presence in 14 countries across Africa, will announce its results for the nine months to 31 December 2020 on 29 January 2021.

According to a statement sent to the Nigerian Stock Exchange, the management will host a conference call on the day of results for analysts and investors at 2:00pm GMT.

Participants are requested to pre-register for the call by navigating to: www.diamondpass.net/4467631 Once registered, participants will receive a calendar invitation with the dial in details for the call.
